title: FLOORINGTON Long Handled Dustpan and Brush Set Upright Broom with Soft Bristles & Durable Dustpan for Indoor and Outdoor Cleaning (GREEN & BLACK)
features: UPGRADED LIGHTWEIGHT DESIGN - This long-handled dustpan and brush set is perfect for both indoor and outdoor use. Weighs only 990g

COMPACT & SPACE-SAVING DESIGN - The tall dustpan and brush set features a compact, space-saving design. The long-handled brush conveniently locks into the dustpan handle, ensuring easy storage and organization.

VERSATILE & DURABLE BRUSH SET - Designed for convenience, this high-quality cleaning brush set is made from durable ABS material. Ideal for use in the kitchen, as a dustpan and brush set, or as a lobby broom and dustpan combo.

HANDS-FREE DIRT REMOVAL - The household broom features built-in comb teeth on the dustpan, allowing for easy debris removal. The long-handled brush ensures efficient cleaning and can also be used as a yard broom.

ADJUSTABLE & ERGONOMIC DESIGN - The lightweight broom features a extendable handle that extends up to 48” for comfortable, upright sweeping. Adjustable broom and dustpan lengths ensure effortless indoor and outdoor cleaning.
description: Product Description A dustpan with built-in comb teeth makes cleaning super easy. Just pull your broom through the comb to remove dust and debris, keeping your broom clean. It’s a simple way to make sure your broom is always ready to use. The dustpan's rubber lip fits tightly against the floor, creating a secure seal that makes sweeping up dirt and debris much easier. This snug fit ensures you won't leave anything behind, helping you achieve a cleaner floor with minimal effort. A foldable dustpan is super convenient because it can be easily collapsed for storage. This makes it perfect for small spaces, ensuring you always have a handy dustpan ready without it taking up much room when not in use.
